response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performers: Ichijou Ririka, Todoroki Hajime, and Juufuutei Raden based on visual analysis. 2. Identified song title: '光のすみか' from on-screen text. 3. Transcribed lyrics from video audio as no external search result provided them. 4. Created two scenes: song performance (00:00-01:47) and talking segment (01:47-end).
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of the song '光のすみか' by hololive members Ichijou Ririka, Todoroki Hajime, and Juufuutei Raden, followed by a talk segment about Van Gogh's 'Sunflowers'.

scenes.description: The song '光のすみか' is performed by Ichijou Ririka, Todoroki Hajime, and Juufuutei Raden.
scenes.performer_in_video: Ichijou Ririka, Todoroki Hajime, Juufuutei Raden
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
透き通った空から
真っ直ぐに差し込んだ
優しい朝陽

過きた季節が
歪みに 削った
今という瞬き

何処にも
同じものはないの
ほら
生きてる証

風は歌い
雨は語り
たどり着くよ
光の すみかへ

幾重にも
重なってる
この
地球の 偶然

影の向こう
真実の色
見つけだすよ
光のすみかへ

一つでも
欠けていたら
きっと
出会えてなかったね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
From the transparent sky
It shone straight down
A gentle morning sun

The past season
Carved into the distortion
The blink of an eye called 'now'

Nowhere
Is there the same thing
Look
Proof of being alive

The wind sings
The rain tells stories
I will reach
The home of light

Layer upon layer
They are piled up
This
Earth's coincidence

Beyond the shadow
The color of truth
I will find it
To the home of light

Even one
If it were missing
Surely
We wouldn't have met

scenes.description: Juufuutei Raden speaks to the audience, introducing a segment about Vincent van Gogh's 'Sunflowers'.
Juufuutei Raden discusses and explains the art piece 'Sunflowers' by Vincent van Gogh.
